title: Brand profile
description: Schema for BRAND.md frontmatter. Required fields establish identity; optional fields tune the rubric and pipeline.

tone_axes.description: 3-7 tone descriptors. Specific (skeptical, plainspoken) beats generic (professional).

audiences.description: Named audiences. Each has needs (an array) and positioning (a sentence).

editorial_guidelines.description: Free-text guidelines that override base rules for voice, tone, depth, and format.

seo_guidelines.description: Free-text SEO rules specific to this brand.

avoid_phrases.description: Brand-specific banned phrases beyond the universal list.

reference_articles.description: URLs of gold-standard articles for few-shot reference.

auto_humanize.description: Run the humanizer after every generation.

include_toc.description: Generate a clickable Table of Contents on long-form articles.

eval_weights.description: Override the default rubric weights. Should sum to 100.

publish_threshold.description: Minimum composite audit score required to publish.
